name: defillama-watchdog
description: DeFi protocol sentinel for proactive TVL monitoring via the DeFiLlama public API. 8 modular scripts covering TVL drops, capital rotation, bridge surges, hack checks, smart money signals, token unlock risks, and revenue growth. HEARTBEAT_OK/ALERT output pattern for agent parsing.
review: Dedicated DeFi protocol sentinel filling a genuine gap in the OpenClaw catalog. Multi-signal HEARTBEAT_OK/ALERT architecture with risk-chaining (TVL drop → capital rotation → hack check) shows intelligent design. Exemplary security hygiene: MIT license, public API, stdlib-only Python, no hardcoded secrets.
